textByHashes.d0296c5bc5380e99ecd6ff2f7be676d9e40dea78: Hello, young one. What brings you to our humble dwelling?
textByHashes.24e9eb1efca738ee26a3d0bd73c609dee8d7be16: These are the Tunnels of Chaos. They radiate with the energy of chaos magic. At the far end of the tunnel, you will find a portal to the Chaos Altar itself where chaos runes are crafted!
textByHashes.662ef4b5e7a628769b103e0a9994db9f9c1cde7f: The nature of chaos magic itself is mysterious and hard to understand.
textByHashes.6fafea92a2bce78ad4f31c346bdc8403b7101d76: The tunnel is here, and yet it is not here. We also are here, where we should be, yet we are somewhere else. And so, the tunnel goes from one place to another, yet touches neither.
textByHashes.ef0a39121677ec51531fe601c8bbf59cea854121: I told you you wouldn't. The best way to think of it is that the tunnel is like a gateway that allows you to travel from one place in the world to another in a more safe and convenient way.
textByHashes.70a2ab18efd372039ac0e1a19cb51cb666b6dcd2: Exactly! Well done! And at the end, there is a portal which will transport you to the Chaos Altar.
textByHashes.9696e81fb1aed3416e53baf92e6f58c844689cf9: Our order is a secret one and those of us that remain and survive through the ages choose to hide ourselves away.
textByHashes.ccaaee48260421f6d329196f6b2adf62af48063b: We have built or found many tunnels such as these. This is not the only one. Rest assured, there are many more of us around.
textByHashes.7450ec40a74b98092764182d4c1819e633043622: Yes, I can understand you would expect it to be since the tunnel leads to the Chaos Altar. And yet, the tunnel does not enter the Wilderness, no.
textByHashes.52ba0f05f47bcc15c7789ef4d09648b2e901659e: Rest assured, you are safe here and should not come to harm.
textByHashes.80c258be979d5774204685648de054b29445ea09: History is written by the strong and the influential.
textByHashes.1f450660c62f10fa1e10ea75e81a5fd066e926a4: It means we cannot always believe what we are told to believe. You would do well to remember that.
